evals.prompt: How should I declare variables in modern JavaScript?
evals.expected_output: const default. let if needed. No var. Block scope only.

evals.prompt: How do I safely access nested object properties if some of them might be missing?
evals.expected_output: Optional Chain ?., Nullish Coalescing ??. No manual undefined checks. Intention-revealing naming.

evals.prompt: How do I handle asynchronous code in modern JavaScript?
evals.expected_output: async/await + try/catch. Promisify everything. No callbacks. ESM import/export.

should_not_trigger: How do I use Java records?
How do I use Kotlin sealed classes?
How do I configure a NestJS module?
How do I write a SQL query?
